title: DBS Christmas and New Year Opening Times 2025
body: "Our Contact Centre will be operating under reduced hours over the Christmas and New Year period. Core DBS services and turnaround times for DBS checks and barring decisions will not be affected, and employers and customers should continue to access our services as normal.    Online services such as the Update Service and online tracking  will also available as usual over Christmas.     Date Opening hours     22nd December 9am to 5pm   23rd December 9am to 5pm   24th December 9am to 3pm   Christmas Day Closed   Boxing Day Closed   29th December 9am to 5pm   30th December 9am to 5pm   31st December 9am to 3pm   New Year’s Day Closed   2nd January 9am to 5pm    "
